title: CloudZero Cost
description: Represents a cost data record returned by the CloudZero Billing API, including grouped dimensions and time-series cost values.

group.description: Key-value pairs representing the dimensions this cost record is grouped by (e.g., Account, Service, Region).

timestamp.description: Timestamp for the cost data point.

value.description: Cost amount for the data point.

cost.description: Time-series array of cost data points.
